subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto them that have believed in God, the Mighty, the All-Wise. Verily, We guide whomsoever We will among Our servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله العزیز الحکیم انا نهدی من نشاء من عبادنا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Twelfth Imam; the Qa'im
